title: Here's What Actually Counts As ‘Moderate Exercise’
summary: The guidelines from public health organizations tell you to aim for at least 150 minutes of “moderate” exercise each week , and that each minute of “vigorous” exercise counts double. Moderate exercise is sometimes conflated with "zone 2" exercise.
